subject: Re: Never-ending loading in M
body:
Hi all,

is there any update on the "Figuring out memory capacity" issue on some 
network systems? Any tweaks to not get stuck in this step other than 
changing the file system?
For us it works completely fine under windows (locally and on network) but 
it has become a roadblock for trying to make M work on wine on our cluster. 
This seems to be independent of the node (used quite different node setups 
already regarding GPU).
At the moment we are working with 2the 020-11-04 nightly build.
Any input would be highly appreciated!

Cheers,
Florian

alist...@gmail.com schrieb am Freitag, 10. Juni 2022 um 19:10:39 UTC+2:

> Hi Piotr,
>
> I have seen this with files on a networked filesystem, it went away when 
> working locally - worth a try!
>
> Cheers,
>
> Alister
>
> On 10 Jun 2022, at 16:49, Piotr Tokarz <pts...@gmail.com> wrote:
>
> Hey all,
>
> I have had an issue with this message for at least an hour since I 
> started. Did anyone struggle with a similar situation? I assume problems 
> with access to files? I have never worked with M before.
>
>
> Have a great weekend!
> Piotr
>
>
> <Screenshot 2022-06-10 at 17.47.32.png>
